name: AI Code Review Analyzer
description: Submit a code snippet or file for Claude AI to review. Gets a thorough analysis covering bugs, security issues, performance, style, and improvement suggestions, posted to Slack.

source.originalName: ChatGPT Automatic Code Review in Gitlab MR

slackChannel.description: Slack channel ID to post the code review

code.description: Code snippet or code content to review

language.description: Programming language (e.g. 'python', 'javascript', 'go'). Leave blank for auto-detection.

context.description: Additional context about the code (e.g. 'This is a REST API handler', 'Part of a payment processing pipeline')
